name: Chocolate Rum Cream- Master Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk 4 ounces of semisweet chocolate and hot water together until melted.
2. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
3. Whip cream until nearly stiff.
4. Gently fold the cooled chocolate mixture and rum into the whipped cream.
Source: New York's Master Chefs, Bon Appetit Magazine
Written by Richard Sax, Photographs by Nancy McFarland
The Knapp Press, Los Angeles, 1985
Chef: Seppi Renggli, The Four Seasons Restaurant, New York
Owners: Tom Margittai and Paul Kovi
Pastry: Bruno Comin
